title: tuple
manager: Fixed-length, heterogeneous tuples — `(int, string, bool)` — for the small structured values that don't deserve a named record: a coordinate pair, a key-and-weight, a labeled return. Positional and typed per slot, so the checker knows exactly what sits at each index and a mismatched shape is a compile error rather than a runtime surprise when someone reads position 2 expecting a string.
cs: fixed-arity heterogeneous tuple; per-position typing; structural; pattern-matchable in case (W6.41).
